title: AI Agent-Powered Inbox Opportunity Scout
concept: An assistant that scans a solo founder's inbound messages, support tickets, and community mentions to identify repeat customer pain points, then turns them into validated micro-product opportunities.
monetization: Subscription for founders and indie hackers
Premium integrations with Gmail, Discord, and Linear
execution_steps: Connect one message source and classify recurring pain points
Generate a weekly opportunity brief with evidence snippets
Add validation prompts and landing-page copy generation
Launch to founder communities and iterate on signal quality
status: Example payload for the automation scaffold; not yet published as an idea.
